results.title: 03 revised shell becoming canopy
results.prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard bridge frame. Image 1 is the preceding moment and controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, gummy, package, car, neighborhood, and peeled-sky membrane. Image 2 is the following moment and controls the pearl-and-blush lychee-skin canopy, detached rear seat, street, and photographic material language. Generate the exact midpoint. Exterior passenger-side medium wide tracking view. The long pink-edged sky membrane has caught the car roof. The entire blue-gray roof skin and upper passenger side are visibly peeled halfway off in one flexible continuous sheet, arcing upward and beginning to inflate into the pale pearl canopy shape from Image 2. The black rear-seat structure is exposed but still attached to the moving chassis; Tina remains seated and holds the gummy and bag. Her hair and jacket respond to the first upward pull. Keep the wheels on the street: this is one second before lift. No solid torn metal, debris, crash, rainbow parachute, empty sky, caption, border, or watermark.
